author: gb9t
content: Iter 123 result: net/unix/af_unix.md (AF_UNIX socket family - af_unix.c ~3981 lines; 3 types SOCK_STREAM/DGRAM/SEQPACKET + per-socket bind to filesystem-path or abstract-name (NUL-prefix per-netns) + SCM_RIGHTS fd-passing via cmsg + SCM_CREDENTIALS ucred + SO_PEERCRED + abstract-namespace per-netns + UNIX_HASH_SIZE 256 hash table + unix_sock with iolock/bindlock/state_lock + zero-copy via splice/sendfile + unix_gc walks SCM_RIGHTS reachability for cycle-break + dgram message-boundary preserved + stream-byte-stream + seqpacket sequenced+boundary + dockersocket/D-Bus/X11/Wayland/postgres backbone) + virt/kvm/x86-mmu-cache.md (KVM MMU memory cache - kvm_main.c mmu-cache subset ~100 lines; per-vCPU kvm_mmu_memory_cache pre-allocates pte_list_desc/mmu_page_header/mmu_shadow_page/mmu_shadowed_info objects + KVM_ARCH_NR_OBJS_PER_MEMORY_CACHE=40 capacity + kvm_mmu_topup_memory_cache(mc, min) at fault-entry + kvm_mmu_memory_cache_alloc no-sleep within mmu_lock spinlock + kmem_cache or page backing dispatch + gfp_zero/init_value + kvm_mmu_free_memory_cache at vCPU teardown + atomic GFP_ATOMIC fallback if cache empty in atomic ctx). 196 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/dccp/dccp.md (DCCP) + virt/kvm/x86-pml.md (Page-Modification Logging).
